examples: She wore a lovely tiara but the groom, not to be outdone, had on a very smart embroidered waistcoat.
Not to be outdone, England's Queen Victoria also appeared in public wearing a mauve gown, thus making it all the rage in England as well.
Not to be outdone, the early 21st century has seen a flurry of Atlantisitis.
Not to be outdone, Sweden's politicians grab 53% of GDP (it was 40% in 1970).
Not to be outdone, Sir Richard Branson and Mark Cuban will each try to trump Trump.
